page_title: Access Health & Wellness Care - McGill University
parsed_sample: If you are experiencing an emergency , a life-or limb-threatening situations or immediate safety concerns, call 911 or Go to the nearest hospital emergency department. You may also consult the Student Wellness Hub’s urgent care page to find an appropriate resource.

page_title: Community Resources | Student Wellness Hub - McGill University
parsed_sample: There are many resources available to students in the broader health and social services community in Montreal and Quebec. Some are at no-cost, but many do have out-of-pocket fees or require you to submit claims to your health insurance.

page_title: Scholarships and Student Aid - McGill University
parsed_sample: Find all the resources and advice you need to help pay for university, from step-by-step guides on how to apply for funding to information on how to budget effectively. Not sure where to start? These areas are a good bet (or you can click on our full directory drop-down list below ):

page_title: International Student Funding - McGill University
parsed_sample: McGill recognises the challenges International students can face when studying away from home. Scholarships and Student Aid is committed to ensuring that qualified students from any geographic region are financially supported in their goals to enter and complete academic programs at the University. This page points to the various funding opportunities that will help support these goals.

page_title: Career Planning Service - McGill University
parsed_sample: The Career Planning Service (CaPS), McGill’s central career services, supports student career and leadership development through career counselling and advising, skills development workshops, experiential learning, career exploration programs, mentoring, and career and networking events. CaPS provides and oversees a wide variety of resources and tools to help students search for part-time and summer jobs, internships and post-graduation opportunities, including the myFuture platform, and the Student Experience Record , with the goal of helping students become career-ready now and for their fut

page_title: Work | International Student Services - McGill University
parsed_sample: As a full-time International McGill student, you can work both on campus and off-campus, but it's important to ensure that you have the right documents to do so legally.

page_title: Campus Life & Engagement - McGill University
parsed_sample: Campus Life & Engagement fosters, in collaboration with partners across McGill and the greater Montreal communities, a vibrant, engaging and inclusive McGill community, where we help every student find inspiration, a sense of belonging, and opportunities to lead, connect, and grow.

page_title: Students - Canada.ca
parsed_sample: Topics/services specifically for students. For topics of interest to everyone, see Income tax .

page_title: Taxes for International students studying in Canada - Canada.ca
parsed_sample: If you are an international student studying in Canada, you may have to file a Canadian income tax return. You must determine your residency status to know how you will be taxed in Canada.

page_title: Integration support services offered by partner community organizations | Gouvernement du Québec
parsed_sample: About a hundred community organizations offer support to newcomers in their integration process in Quebec. This may include, for example, assistance in finding housing, support in the settlement process, information on obtaining essential documents or personalized, adapted and sustained support to develop independence.

page_title: Settle and integrate in Québec | Gouvernement du Québec
parsed_sample: This page is intended for immigrants selected by Québec. It brings together information and advice to ease your settlement and successfully integrate into Québec.

page_title: Integration service for immigrants | Gouvernement du Québec
parsed_sample: Since June 1, 2023, public services are provided exclusively in French, with some exceptions. In accordance with the exemplarity of the State, the temporary measures (sunset provisions) will end on December 1, 2025. The proposed provisions will then be applied in full.

page_title: Registering with a family doctor or a specialized nurse practitioner in primary care | Gouvernement du Québec
parsed_sample: Since April 15, 2024, specialized nurse practitioners in primary care who work in SNP clinics can directly care for people who do not have a family doctor and who are registered on the Québec Family Doctor Finder.

page_title: Asylum seekers | Gouvernement du Québec
parsed_sample: You are entitled to certain services from the Gouvernement du Québec as soon as you have submitted an asylum application with the Government of Canada and you live in Québec.

page_title: The Open Database of Healthcare Facilities
parsed_sample: The Open Database of Healthcare Facilities (ODHF) is a collection of open data containing the names, types, and locations of healthcare facilities across Canada. It is released under the Open Government License - Canada .

page_title: Student Services - McGill University
parsed_sample: From navigating university life to planning what comes next, Student Services is here to support you - academically, personally, and professionally. Whether you’re accessing care for your physical and mental health, connecting with spiritual or international communities, exploring career paths, finding financial or learning support, or getting involved in student life, we’re here for you.

page_title: Student Housing - McGill University
parsed_sample: Living on campus offers many benefits beyond the convenience of being just minutes from class. McGill Residences provide a welcoming, supportive environment that helps students thrive academically, socially, and personally.

page_title: Office of the Dean of Students - McGill University
parsed_sample: Our job is to listen, learn, advise, and support your best McGill experience.

parsed_sample: Empowering students to reach their academic potential by widening access to learning.

page_title: Office of Religious and Spiritual Life - McGill University
parsed_sample: All McGill students can access support and spiritual care from the Office of Religious & Spiritual Life.

page_title: First Peoples' House - McGill University
parsed_sample: Our team at First Peoples’ House, McGill University is looking for a creative, community‑minded Communications & Publication Coordinator to help elevate Indigenous student voices and support our programming.

parsed_sample: RAMQ administers the Québec Health Insurance Plan. Eligible persons who are registered benefit from various covered health services. Ineligible people can also access theses services, but they must pay for them.
